name: Light Vegetable Broth
recipeIngredient: 2 cups White wine or unsweetened apple cider
2 large potatoes; scrubbed and coarsely chopped
1 leek, white part only; cleaned and thinly sliced
1/2 pound mushrooms; cleaned and left whole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all of the ingredients in a large soup pot.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat, cover, and simmer over low heat for 3 to 4 hours.
4. Strain the broth and discard the vegetables.
5. Freeze in 1- to 2-cup containers for use in recipes calling for vegetable stock or broth.
